title: Nostic Heresy
lyrics: ♪♪ Ooh, maybe shut the door a little bit, if you could for me, man. I'm sorry, don't hit the TV out there in the front. Oh, life, are you out in front of life? And I know then that you're all space and time, but you're still inside. Fuck that state that I'm lost. Fuck being the one that I bought and said, I am fine. And to fuck all the things from out of spell of mind inside, you know you just paint your own world. Ooh, high as a motherfucker. High as a motherfucker. Yeah, high as a motherfucker. In the face when you look. Are you alone?  Dying for me. I'm dying. Did you know how to let go? Stop dying for yourself. Stop dying for me. Stop trying for me. Stop lying for me. Stop tonight for me. Stop getting over me and fucking me and doing everything that you're putting to destroy your own mind. How you gonna be a partner, dear? How you even trying to fucking climb? How you go up? You're just down, down, toxic to the head, the dog, and the fat. End of time, disaster. End of mind for Ryan. Just for Ryan. Just a lion. Is it Brian or is it a Hawaiian fantasy? Water dragon set. And you want your money back. You can't fucking have it, fucking fool. You can't have it. You can't have it, fucking fool. You can't have it. You can't have it. You can't have it. I see time and space like you want to go have like a latte or lunch, like stop fucking living. It can't end everything you see. Through communication, it's more. You get more. You see it. Fruitions of life everywhere. It's what we do.
